description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish that runs when a tag is pushed. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python 3.10, upgrade pip, install dependencies from requirements.txt, install build, build a binary wheel and source tarball with python -m build, and publish the distribution to both Test PyPI and PyPI using pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish with API tokens from secrets.
